---
id: get-jwks
title: "JSON Web Key Set"
description: "Returns the public keys used to verify ID tokens and other signed JWTs issued by the authorization server."
sidebar_label: "JSON Web Key Set"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: identity/api/v2/eurofurence-identity
custom_edit_url: null

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"JSON Web Key Set"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/.well-known/jwks.json"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the public keys used to verify ID tokens and other signed JWTs issued by the authorization server.

Clients should cache this response and refresh it periodically or when encountering an unknown `kid` in a JWT header.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./get-jwks.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./get-jwks.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
